name: workflow-tools
description: Codex planning, explanation, and workflow skills.

interface.shortDescription: Clear explanations and Plan Mode critique.
interface.longDescription: Workflow Tools packages Explain Clearly for concise explanations with mental models and examples, plus Deep Planning for adversarial Plan Mode critique and execution routing.
defaultPrompt: Use $explain-clearly to explain this with a simple mental model and concrete example.
Use $deep-planning to critique this plan before implementation.
Review this Plan Mode request for assumptions, risks, and routing.
